## Meeting Purpose

[Establish a scene for future editorial alignment meetings and address critical content quality and workflow issues.](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Urgent workflow adoption**: All content must be generated through workflows to ensure company viability](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [**Quality improvement initiative**: Comprehensive workflow audit and optimization underway to enhance output quality](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**CM role redefinition**: Content Managers should focus on providing detailed feedback and refining workflows, not manual writing](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Communication emphasis**: Increased transparency and proactive communication are crucial for preventing client churn](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

## Topics

### Leverage and Workflow Utilization

  - [Content org faces a critical leverage issue with inconsistent workflow usage](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Only 20-25% of current content is considered excellent; the rest needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Project underway to copy and optimize all client workflows for 80th-90th percentile content output](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Goal: Have everyone using workflows for at least the first draft of content](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

### Quality Assessment Findings

  - [Common issues identified that need platform-level fixes](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Different levels of CM agency observed; some CMs may not be the right fit](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Shift in CM profile: moving from copywriters to editors with automation experience](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [CMs must articulate issues clearly and feed improvements back into the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

### Workflow Improvement Process

  - [Copying existing workflows to a separate workspace for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Updating polishing instructions and feedback mechanisms](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Standardizing workflow structures and artifact naming conventions](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Potential customization of workflows based on specific client needs (e.g., fact-checking, image generation)](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Communication and Support

  - [Emphasis on proactive communication to prevent issues and client churn](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Open-door policy for questions and problem-solving at all levels](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Future implementation of client ops engineers to assist with custom solutions](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

### Specific Workflow Enhancements

  - [Internal linking workflow improvements planned](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Research workflow can be guardrailed with knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Importance of including "escape hatches" in prompts to allow LLMs to indicate uncertainty](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)

## Next Steps

  - [MEs to work with CMs on improving polishing instructions and feedback in workflows](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Directors to escalate concerns about CM performance if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Team to record and report instances of manual fixes for potential workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Management to provide updated documentation on workflow capabilities and best practices](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [All team members to think about larger architectural issues for discussion in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
  - [Utilize the Directors and MEs chat for sharing best practices and solutions](https://fathom.video/share/n9sJsUrNJN5MaBDvV2S-CFNyMJsE8ejz?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
